tokenGeneration.name: TraderFrame - Evidence Gate
tokenGeneration.objective: Create visual and motion tokens for the Evidence Gate experience
tokenGeneration.coreMessage: Market conviction becomes credible when evidence is filtered, challenged, approved and recorded transparently.

icon.name: Evidence Gate
icon.description: A stylized gate with a transparent panel, symbolizing the threshold between raw data and verified evidence.
icon.motion: Fade in from left to right with a subtle glow effect.

evidencePanel.name: Evidence Panel
evidencePanel.description: A semi-transparent, glass-like panel that displays real-time data, with a dark background for contrast.
evidencePanel.motion: Slide in from the top with a smooth easing effect.

approvalBadge.name: Approval Badge
approvalBadge.description: A circular badge with a green checkmark, indicating evidence has been validated.
approvalBadge.motion: Pop in with a slight scale-up animation.

riskIndicator.name: Risk Indicator
riskIndicator.description: A red/green bar that shows risk level in real-time, with a subtle pulse animation.
riskIndicator.motion: Pulse on hover with a 0.5s cycle.

userControlPanel.name: User Control Panel
userControlPanel.description: A collapsible panel with toggle switches and sliders for filtering and controlling evidence flow.
userControlPanel.motion: Slide in from the right with a smooth transition.

gateOpening.description: A smooth transition from a closed gate to an open gate, symbolizing the process of evidence validation.

evidenceFlow.description: A continuous flow of data points entering the gate, with some being filtered out and others passing through.

approvalAnimation.description: A glowing checkmark animation that appears when evidence is approved.

riskAlert.description: A red pulse animation that highlights risk when it exceeds a threshold.

userControlTransition.description: A smooth transition when user controls are toggled, with a slight fade and scale effect.

motionSensitivity.description: All motion tokens are optional and can be disabled for users with motion sensitivity.

keyboardNavigation.description: All interactive elements are accessible via keyboard, with focus states clearly visible.

screenReaderLabels.description: All interactive elements have descriptive ARIA labels for screen readers.

implementationNotes.visualTokens: Use SVG or Web Components for icons and panels to ensure scalability and performance.
implementationNotes.motionTokens: Implement with CSS animations or Web Animations API for smooth, consistent transitions.
implementationNotes.accessibilityTokens: Ensure all motion tokens have `prefers-reduced-motion` media query support and provide alternative static states for users with motion sensitivity.
